overall.description: Spider-Man perched on a skyscraper ledge overlooking a bustling Times Square-like urban intersection. The video game footage shows heavy traffic and pedestrians below between modern glass towers with large digital billboards, captured from a static third-person perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: skyscraper ledge overlooking major commercial intersection

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crouched on building ledge, occasionally shifting weight and looking down at the street below

entered.detail: Tall modern glass building with reflective windows rising immediately to the left of the ledge
Tall modern glass building with multiple digital billboards and screens on the facade
Large red digital billboard with white text visible at the end of the street canyon
Concrete building ledge where Spider-Man is perched, with metal railing visible
Multi-lane city street with moving traffic and crosswalks visible far below
Purple-lit digital screen on the right building facade displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man remains perched on a high-rise building ledge between two modern glass skyscrapers, overlooking a busy commercial intersection resembling Times Square. The camera maintains a steady third-person view as traffic moves along the multi-lane street below and pedestrians traverse the crosswalks, while digital billboards illuminate the right-hand building facade.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady third-person perspective of a superhero perched high above a vibrant, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins with Spider-Man remaining motionless on a high-rise ledge, framed between two towering modern glass skyscrapers. As the camera holds its position, the focus shifts to the rhythmic flow of heavy traffic moving along the multi-lane street below. The scene then expands to capture pedestrians traversing the crosswalks, while bright digital billboards continue to illuminate the surrounding building facades.
